prompt: Task manager for an engineering team. Tasks have due dates, assignees, priorities, and status. Team lead gets a Slack message when a task is overdue.
original_prompt: Task manager for an engineering team. Tasks have due dates, assignees, priorities, and status. Team lead gets a Slack message when a task is overdue.

assumptions: The application will have a web-based interface
The application will use a database to store task information
The team lead will receive a Slack message when a task is overdue
clarifications_received: engineers in a startup across various domains

entities.name: Task
entities.description: Represents a task in the task manager

relations.description: A task is assigned to one assignee
A team lead is notified about a task

business_rules.name: Overdue Task Notification
business_rules.description: Send a Slack message to the team lead when a task is overdue

data_flows.name: Task Creation
data_flows.description: Create a new task in the database

data_flows.name: Task Update
data_flows.description: Update an existing task in the database

data_flows.name: Overdue Task Notification
data_flows.description: Send a Slack message to the team lead when a task is overdue

Table 'Task' has a foreign key 'team_lead_id' that references table 'Team Lead' which is not defined in the schema

conflicts.resolution_strategy: Review and update permissions matrix to ensure consistency

conflicts.description: Premium plan gate 'create_team_lead' is restricted but role 'Team Lead' has permission to create 'Team Lead'
conflicts.resolution_strategy: Review and update premium plan gates to ensure consistency with permissions matrix

mermaid_diagrams.api_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
    participant TaskManager as \"Task Manager\"
    participant Assignee as \"Assignee\"
    participant TeamLead as \"Team Lead\"
    TaskManager->>Assignee: Assign task
    Assignee->>TaskManager: Update task status
    TaskManager->>TeamLead: Notify team lead
    TeamLead->>TaskManager: Update task priority
    TaskManager->>Assignee: Update task assignment
